class.name: RopeAnchor
class.brief_description: An anchor point for a Rope that can apply forces to a parent RigidBody3D.
class.description: RopeAnchor is a Node3D that serves as an attachment point on a Rope. When parented to a RigidBody3D, it can apply tension forces at its position in the body's local coordinate space. The [member behavior] property controls how the anchor interacts with the rope.

method.name: get_parent_rigid_body
method.description: Returns the parent node if it is a [RigidBody3D], otherwise returns [code]null[/code].

method.name: apply_force
method.description: Applies a force to the parent [RigidBody3D] at this anchor's global position. The position is automatically converted to a global offset from the body's origin.

members.member: The behavior mode of this anchor. See [enum Behavior] for available modes.

constants.constant: The rope cannot move this anchor point.
The rope pulls on the parent rigid body at this point.
The rope travels freely through this point, but the rope cannot move the anchor.
